title: Ordering at the Restaurant
opening: Welcome! Are you ready to order, or do you need a few more minutes?

t1.prompt: Welcome! Are you ready to order, or do you need a few more minutes?
t1.promptTranslation: Welcome! (Well-kuhm!) Are you ready to order, or do you need a few more minutes?

t2.prompt: Excellent! What can I get for you today? Have you seen anything you like?
t2.promptTranslation: Excellent! (Ex-uh-lent!) What can I get for you today? Have you seen anything you like?

t3.prompt: No problem at all. Take your time. I'll come back in a few minutes. Would you like a drink while you decide?
t3.promptTranslation: No problem at all. Take your time. I'll come back in a few minutes. (I'll be back soon.) Would you like a drink while you decide?

t4.prompt: Certainly! What can I get you to drink?
t4.promptTranslation: Certainly! (Sir-tuhn-lee!) What can I get you to drink?

t5.prompt: Our special today is the grilled salmon, and the pasta primavera is always a popular choice. Which sounds better to you?
t5.promptTranslation: Our special today is the grilled salmon (Sal-muhn), and the pasta primavera is always a popular choice. Which sounds better to you?

t6.prompt: No problem, we can accommodate most requests. Do you have any specific allergies or dietary needs I should know about?
t6.promptTranslation: No problem, we can accommodate most requests. Do you have any specific allergies or dietary needs (die-eh-tuh-ree needs) I should know about?

t7.prompt: Excellent choice! And will that be all for you, or is there anything else I can get started for you?
t7.promptTranslation: Excellent choice! (Ex-uh-lent choys!) And will that be all for you, or is there anything else I can get started for you?

t-repeat.prompt: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat it, or tell me what you'd like to do?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. (I didn't understand.) Could you please repeat it, or tell me what you'd like to do?

t-end.prompt: Thank you for dining with us! Have a wonderful day.
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you for dining with us! Have a wonderful day.
